item.title: A baby taken away, then found years later
item.description: A missing child case leads to a powerful reunion years later, with the full timeline adding new context to the story.

media:content.media:title: A baby taken away, then found years later
media:content.media:description: A missing child case leads to a powerful reunion years later, with the full timeline adding new context to the story.

item.title: New filing adds to the hotel case timeline
item.description: A new filing adds scrutiny to the timeline in this hotel case, which continues to draw attention from police and the public.

item.title: A missed warning changes the case timeline
item.description: A closer look at the timeline reveals a missed warning that changed everything in this cold case.

item.title: DNA detail changes the timeline
item.description: Not every discovery makes life better. A collection of surprising, funny, or unexpected moments that might have been better left unseen.

media:content.media:description: Not every discovery makes life better. A collection of surprising, funny, or unexpected moments that might have been better left unseen.

item.title: A timeline that raises questions
item.description: Fifteen years later, the timeline draws new attention to the case and the dismissal that followed.

item.title: What changed after she was found at the beach
item.description: A timeline of the case shows why it still raises questions after she was found at the beach.
